title: Expedia (EXPE) is a Top-Ranked Value Stock: Should You Buy?
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Online Travel Agencies Booking And Expedia Look Cheap Right Now
text: When the COVID-19 pandemic grounded planes and shuttered hotels around the world, the travel industry was instantly in dire straits.

title: Expedia And Guillermo Ochoa Encourage U.S Latinos To Travel To Mexico City
text: The leading travel company hopes to engage this segment of the population to visit the Mexican capital and share our love of food.

title: Expedia Group Names Ex-Williams-Sonoma CFO Julie Whalen as its CFO
text: Expedia has announced that Julie Whalen will be the new Executive Vice President (EVP) and CFO of Expedia Group, a press release said, coming from her previous job at Williams-Sonoma. She'll succeed Eric Hart, who will still stay with the company until Oct. 1.

title: Expedia, Williams-Sonoma both name new CFOs as Julie Whalen makes move
text: Expedia Group Inc. EXPE, +1.85% said late Wednesday that Julie Whalen will start as the online travel company's chief financial officer near the end of the month. Whalen, who succeeds Eric Hart, has served on Expedia's board for more than three years, and is coming to Expedia from Williams-Sonoma Inc. WSM, -0.24% , where she served as CFO.

title: Expedia CEO: 'Business travel is back' like I predicted all along during the Covid pandemic
text: "People are traveling like crazy," the CEO said, speaking with Jim Cramer, who was in Expedia's home city of Seattle for "Mad Money."

title: PayPal Hires Former Expedia Marketplace President John Kim as CPO
text: PayPal has said it has a new Executive Vice President (EVP), Chief Product Officer (CPO) in John Kim, formerly of Expedia, a press release says. He will succeed current CPO Mark Britto, who plans to retire at the end of the year.

title: PayPal names Expedia executive its next chief product officer
text: PayPal Holdings Inc. PYPL, +1.26% said Thursday that it has tapped John Kim, an Expedia Group Inc. EXPE, +0.77% veteran, to be its next chief product officer. Kim, who spent a decade with the online-travel company, most recently as the president of Expedia Marketplace, will take over the PayPal position Sept.
